one_time_description: Gain on sale of portfolio investments ($87,458) and impairment recovery of portfolio investments ($12,330)
economic_notes: Investments in Boundary Waters Anishinaabeg Development LP, Rainy Lake Tribal Development Corporation, Senic River Mall Inc., Indigenous Transmission LP, and other regional partnerships. Advances made to Rainy Lake Tribal Development Corporation and Senic River Mall Inc.
notes: Prior period adjustment made to correct amortization overstatement affecting housing tangible capital assets (understated by $124,954) and opening accumulated surplus (understated by $66,744). 2021 figures restated. Consolidated entities: Seine River First Nation Development Corporation and Mudges Camp (2018) LTD. Due from government increased significantly from $681,108 to $1,347,951. ISC funding figure taken from Note 6 (Indigenous Services Canada receivable) as ISC transfer breakdown not separately disclosed in revenue note; total government transfers includes federal ($4,378,027) and provincial ($1,314,296) and Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership ($433,023). OSR calculated as total revenue less government transfers including OFNLP.
